steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Use the two given points, $(0,0)$ and $(1,8)$.
$$\frac{8-0}{1-0}=8$$

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: Because the line passes through $(0,0)$, its $y$-intercept is $0$. A linear function with slope $8$ and intercept $0$ is $$h(x)=8x$$ The answer is A.
